languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

languages.text: "Да-да, чем больше неудобных железок вы засунете в свои тела с присущим мон-кай "мастерством", тем больше боли и страданий будет источать каждый из вас на этой палубе. Воистину создание оптимальных условий для меня".

"Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

"Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

"Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

languages.text: 「ええ、ええ、あなたたちの生まれ持ったモンケィの「スキル」で、より粗い金属を体内に無理やり押し込むほど、このデッキにいるあなたたち一人ひとりが感じる苦痛と苦しみは増す。本当に、あなたは俺にとって最適な条件を作り出しているね」
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、ええ、あなたたちの生まれ持ったモンケィグの「スキル」で、より粗い金属を体内に無理やり押し込むほど、このデッキにいるあなたたち一人ひとりが感じる苦痛と苦しみは増します。本当に、あなたは私にとって最適な条件を作り出していますね。」

languages.text: « Oui, oui. Continuez donc à truffer vos corps de grossières pièces de métal avec vos "talents" innés de mon-keigh. Vous ne ferez qu'exacerber la douleur de tous ceux qui se trouvent sur ce pont et mettre en place des conditions idéales pour moi. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, oui. Continuez donc à truffer vos corps de grossières pièces de métal avec vos "talents" innés de mon-keigh. Vous ne ferez qu'exacerber la douleur de tous ceux qui se trouvent sur ce pont et mettre en place des conditions idéales pour moi. »

languages.text: "Ja, ja, je mehr Metall Ihr mit dem angeborenen 'Geschick' der Chem-Pan-Sey in Eure Körper treibt, desto mehr Schmerz und Leid wird jeder Einzelne von Euch auf diesem Deck verbreiten. Damit schafft ihr tatsächlich die optimalen Bedingungen für mich."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ja, je mehr Metall Ihr mit dem angeborenen 'Geschick' der Chem-Pan-Sey in Eure Körper treibt, desto mehr Schmerz und Leid wird jeder Einzelne von Euch auf diesem Deck verbreiten. Damit schafft ihr tatsächlich die optimalen Bedingungen für mich."

languages.text: "Evet, doğuştan gelen mon-keigh 'becerinizle' vücudunuza ne kadar çok kaba metal parçası tıkıştırırsanız bu güvertedeki her biriniz o kadar çok acı ve ızdırap yayacak. Gerçekten benim için en uygun koşulları yaratıyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

traits.locale_text: "Evet, doğuştan gelen mon-keigh 'becerinizle' vücudunuza ne kadar çok kaba metal parçası tıkıştırırsanız bu güvertedeki her biriniz o kadar çok acı ve ızdırap yayacak. Gerçekten benim için en uygun koşulları yaratıyorsunuz."

languages.text: «Sí, sí, cuantos más trozos de metal os incrustáis en el cuerpo con vuestra "habilidad" de mon-keigh, más dolor y sufrimiento exudan las almas de esta cubierta. Estáis creando las condiciones óptimas para mi vida aquí».
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, sí, cuantos más trozos de metal os incrustáis en el cuerpo con vuestra "habilidad" de mon-keigh, más dolor y sufrimiento exudan las almas de esta cubierta. Estáis creando las condiciones óptimas para mi vida aquí».

languages.text: “是啊，你们这些猴子靠着所谓的‘天赋’，往自己身体里塞更多粗糙的金属，每个人随之散发的痛苦与折磨就越加浓烈。说真的，你们简直是在为我创造极佳的条件。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, the more crude pieces of metal you force into your bodies with your inherent mon-keigh 'skill,' the more pain and suffering each of you on this deck will exude. Truly, you are creating the optimal conditions for me."
